name: Smart Grid AMI Meter Manipulation
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of smart grid Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI) to manipulate energy metering, demand response programs, and distribution automation
root_objective: Manipulate smart grid metering and demand response for financial fraud or grid destabilisation

nodes.title: Manipulate Smart Grid AMI Infrastructure
nodes.description: Compromise AMI smart meters and head-end systems to commit energy theft, falsify demand response, or destabilise grid distribution

nodes.title: Compromise Individual Smart Meter
nodes.description: Gain control of an individual smart meter to modify readings or execute commands

nodes.title: Extract Firmware via JTAG/Debug Port
nodes.description: Access the meter's hardware debug interface to dump firmware and extract encryption keys

nodes.title: Exploit Zigbee/RF Mesh Protocol
nodes.description: Attack the ZigBee Smart Energy or RF mesh network connecting meters to exploit protocol weaknesses

nodes.title: Compromise AMI Head-End System
nodes.description: Attack the central system managing all smart meters for the utility

nodes.title: Exploit Head-End Web Application
nodes.description: Attack the web management portal of the AMI head-end to gain administrative access

nodes.title: Push Malicious Firmware Update
nodes.description: Use compromised head-end access to push modified firmware to all meters in the service area

nodes.title: Manipulate Demand Response
nodes.description: Abuse demand response mechanisms to cause grid instability

nodes.title: Trigger Mass Service Disconnect
nodes.description: Send remote disconnect commands to thousands of meters simultaneously to cause sudden load change

nodes.title: Forge Demand Response Signals
nodes.description: Inject false demand response messages to simultaneously switch on/off thousands of controllable loads

nodes.title: Energy Theft at Scale
nodes.description: Modify meter readings to undercount energy consumption for financial fraud

nodes.title: Modify Consumption Register
nodes.description: Alter the meter's energy register to report lower consumption than actual usage

nodes.title: Sell Modified Meter Firmware
nodes.description: Distribute hacked meter firmware commercially for widespread energy theft
